_comment: TodoWrite rendering fixture. A casual 'make me a todo list' prompt does NOT reliably trigger the TodoWrite tool — CC just writes a markdown numbered list as plain assistant text. To force the tool path we explicitly instruct CC to USE the TodoWrite tool and give it a concrete multi-step task it would normally track. The task (planning coffee) is deliberately trivial so CC doesn't try to execute it; we just want the TodoWrite call with 5 items.

steps.data: Use the TodoWrite tool RIGHT NOW to create a 5-item todo list for making pour-over coffee. Don't execute any steps — just call TodoWrite with the 5 items, each with content and activeForm. Then stop.
